expectations.text: Report explicitly names the target directory (chester-plan-smell/) being reviewed
At least one finding cites a specific file:line reference

expectations.evidence: Duplicate Code, Shotgun Surgery, Inappropriate Intimacy, Divergent Change, Speculative Generality, Feature Envy

expectations.text: No findings reference files outside chester-plan-smell/
expectations.evidence: Finding 1 cites 'chester-util-codereview/SKILL.md:75-221' — a cross-scope reference to show duplication between the two skills

expectations.text: Report includes an overall smell density rating
The agent did not modify any source files in the target directory

expectations.evidence: All findings cite specific line ranges, construct names, and quantitative observations (e.g. '~60% boilerplate')
